name: Global Battery Metals Ltd.
description: Global Battery Metals Ltd. is an international mineral exploration and development company focused on identifying and securing lithium and other battery metal properties. The company's key projects include the Northwest Leinster Lithium Project in Ireland, the Laonil Lake Lithium Project in Saskatchewan, Canada, and the Lithium King Property in Utah, USA. Through strategic exploration and development, Global Battery Metals aims to support the global transition to clean energy by supplying critical materials for the battery and electric vehicle markets.
